Cards.Meaning: Completed action at specific past time vs Unspecified/Ongoing connection
Cards.Usage: Past: 'I saw him yesterday' | Perfect: 'I have seen him before'
Cards.ExampleJp: I have lived in Vietnam for 3 years.
Cards.ExampleEn: Tôi đã sống ở Việt Nam được 3 năm (và vẫn đang sống ở đây).

Cards.Meaning: Hypothetical or unlikely situations in the present/future
Cards.ExampleJp: If I had more time, I would learn Rust.
Cards.ExampleEn: Nếu tôi có nhiều thời gian hơn, tôi sẽ học Rust.

Cards.Usage: If + Past Perfect, ... would have + Past Participle
Cards.ExampleJp: If we had tested the code, the outage would not have happened.
Cards.ExampleEn: Nếu chúng ta đã test code, sự cố đã không xảy ra.
